promptTemplate: A 3D spring-node physics artwork with {{node_count}} nodes shaped as {{node_shape}} primitives at {{node_size}} scale. Nodes are connected by {{spring_type}} springs with {{spring_length}} spacing, {{spring_stiffness}} stiffness, and {{spring_weight}} line weight. Nodes rotate at {{rotation_speed}} speed with {{mesh_weight}} mesh outlines. Rendered in {{render_mode}} mode with {{trail_mode}} motion trails. Colored using a {{color_palette}} palette with color transition {{color_transition}}.
